variants: Zhikai Weng, who was born in Dovetail Quay, currently lives in Silverbell Bays. He has been honored with the Platinum Hearth Award for his exemplary work in the technology sector. Among his notable contributions, Zhikai authored the Chimney Sweep Algorithm, which has gained recognition for its innovative approach. In addition to his professional pursuits, he is an active member of the Pinehaze Falconers Society, where he enjoys engaging with fellow falconry enthusiasts.

Residing in Silverbell Bays, Zhikai Weng originally comes from Dovetail Quay. He is the recipient of the prestigious Platinum Hearth Award, reflecting his significant achievements within his field.
